Pillar_Narratives.Currency & Liquidity Pressure: This pillar indicates baseline activity, with no specific news headlines pointing to immediate severe currency or liquidity crises. Pillar_Narratives.Sanctions & Regulatory Fragmentation: The current score reflects existing complexities within the international regulatory and sanctions landscape rather than an immediate escalation of new measures.
